projects.name: Project A: Bridge Stabilization & Connectivity
projects.description: Stabilize bridge lifecycle, control APIs, and connectivity telemetry before swarm execution.

milestones.name: A1 Baseline Diagnostics Captured
milestones.successCriteria: All startup paths, endpoints, and failure signatures captured

milestones.name: A2 Reliability Hardening Complete
milestones.successCriteria: Reconnect and fallback behaviors validated

milestones.name: A3 Control Plane Verified
milestones.successCriteria: Bridge control API tests pass across expected/edge cases

milestones.name: A4 Operations Ready
milestones.successCriteria: Operators can detect and recover bridge issues deterministically

tasks.description: Capture bridge startup configuration baseline versus deploy README required values.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Baseline report includes env vars, ports, and mode resolution.
tasks.result: Captured deploy/runtime baseline and validated required env/port/path configuration from README and runtime code.

tasks.description: Validate BridgeAgent process spawn, heartbeat, and shutdown semantics under mesh startup.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Bridge lifecycle events are deterministic and repeatable.
tasks.result: Verified BridgeAgent lifecycle via mesh startup/health/dispatched task path; confirmed reliable spawn and controlled shutdown.

tasks.description: Instrument bridge event taxonomy for connect, dispatch, timeout, and reconnect cases.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Activity logs classify bridge events without ambiguous labels.

tasks.description: Create bridge control endpoint tests for authorized, unauthorized, missing-agent, and already-stopped paths.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Automated test matrix covers all bridge control status codes.
tasks.result: Added automated bridge/dashboard control tests covering unauthorized, token-authorized, and upstream-failure flows in src/__tests__/swarmDashboardRoutes.test.js.

tasks.description: Harden bridge failure handling for unknown agent targets and invalid payload envelopes.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Malformed routing requests fail closed with structured errors.

tasks.description: Validate dashboard-to-mesh bridge control contract and upstream error propagation.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard control actions map correctly to mesh control responses.
tasks.result: Validated dashboard->mesh control contract; patched control access safeguards and confirmed shutdown bridge/swarm flows.

tasks.description: Draft bridge operations runbook with restart, verification, and rollback steps.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Runbook includes deterministic commands and expected outputs.

tasks.description: Exercise multi-hop dispatch scenarios and record latency/jitter baseline for bridge routing.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Bridge routing baseline includes median/p95 timing sample.

tasks.description: Validate dispatch schema constraints (bad JSON, missing task, unknown agent, oversized payload).
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Bridge rejects invalid dispatch payloads with stable error format.

tasks.description: Review SWARM_CONTROL_TOKEN handling and bridge control authorization bypass risk.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Token enforcement behavior documented with no bypass path.
tasks.result: Implemented protection for swarm control endpoints when dashboard auth is disabled; localhost-only or control token required.

tasks.description: Define bridge reliability KPI slice for dashboard (availability, restarts, failures, control success rate).
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: KPI definitions include formulas and source fields.

tasks.description: Publish bridge stabilization sign-off criteria and handoff checklist for orchestrator-only mode.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Bridge acceptance gate clearly defines go/no-go conditions.

history.result: Captured deploy/runtime baseline and validated required env/port/path configuration from README and runtime code.
Verified BridgeAgent lifecycle via mesh startup/health/dispatched task path; confirmed reliable spawn and controlled shutdown.
Validated dashboard->mesh control contract; patched control access safeguards and confirmed shutdown bridge/swarm flows.
Implemented protection for swarm control endpoints when dashboard auth is disabled; localhost-only or control token required.
Added automated bridge/dashboard control tests covering unauthorized, token-authorized, and upstream-failure flows in src/__tests__/swarmDashboardRoutes.test.js.

projects.name: Project B: Swarm Bring-up, Reliability & Orchestration
projects.description: Bring all 32 agents online with stable supervisor/orchestrator task routing and lifecycle controls.

milestones.name: B1 Agent Registration Baseline
milestones.successCriteria: 32 agents register and report healthy status

milestones.name: B2 Task Lifecycle Reliability
milestones.successCriteria: Pending/in-progress/completed/failed transitions validated

milestones.name: B3 Routing and Recovery Stable
milestones.successCriteria: Stall and retry loops resolve without deadlock

milestones.name: B4 Orchestrator High-Level Mode
milestones.successCriteria: Low-level work delegated to specialist agents

tasks.description: Inventory all 32 specialist agents against AGENT_LIST and runtime discovery output.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Agent inventory report reconciles files, env list, and runtime state.
tasks.result: Confirmed full 32-agent inventory and runtime discovery; validated registration through mesh health and dashboard stats.

tasks.description: Define swarm task intake contract and enforce required task metadata fields.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Task schema includes owner, milestone, priority, and acceptance criteria.

tasks.description: Build deterministic registration smoke harness for mesh /health response validation.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Harness flags any missing/offline agent and emits machine-readable output.

tasks.description: Execute supervisor tick scenario matrix for pending, stalled, failed, and requeued tasks.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Scenario outcomes map to expected state transitions.

tasks.description: Validate stalled-task retry thresholds and guard against repeated immediate requeue loops.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Retry behavior follows configured stall/attempt limits.

tasks.description: Analyze inter-agent collaboration routing directives for collision and duplication risks.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Routing policy prevents duplicate execution for same task id.

tasks.description: Harden task ID coercion and ensure missing-id updates fail with actionable diagnostics.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Task updates reject invalid IDs without corrupting project state.

tasks.description: Review orchestrator dispatch ordering for fairness across pending and stalled queues.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Dispatch policy documented with priority rules and starvation protections.

tasks.description: Create supervisor resilience checks for planning-timeout retrigger behavior.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Planning timeout retriggers once per policy and records audit trail.

tasks.description: Stress-test concurrent dispatch submissions and identify race conditions in project updates.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Concurrent dispatch run completes without lost or duplicated states.

tasks.description: Build lifecycle observability assertions for task_received/work_started/work_completed event coherence.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Lifecycle events form a valid sequence per task across sampled runs.

tasks.description: Document orchestrator mode activation criteria and delegation policy once swarm is stable.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Activation checklist defines prerequisites and rollback triggers.

history.result: Confirmed full 32-agent inventory and runtime discovery; validated registration through mesh health and dashboard stats.

projects.name: Project C: Swarm Dashboard Functionality & Integration
projects.description: Ensure swarm dashboard is online, accurate, resilient, and fully aligned to PM data semantics.

milestones.name: C1 Dashboard Availability Stable
milestones.outcome: Core dashboard routes and APIs healthy
milestones.successCriteria: No 5xx on dashboard pages and key APIs

milestones.name: C2 Data Fidelity Complete
milestones.successCriteria: Dashboard metrics match PM source data

milestones.name: C3 UX Resilience Delivered
milestones.successCriteria: Critical UX flows handle edge states gracefully

milestones.name: C4 Analytics and Exports Verified
milestones.successCriteria: JSON/CSV/PDF exports and KPI views validated

tasks.description: Review swarm dashboard route coverage and missing UI states for online/offline/degraded statuses.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard status presentation is explicit across all runtime modes.

tasks.description: Validate swarm stats derivation logic for onlineAgents, uptimePct, and stale agent counts.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Computed metrics match raw event and health data.
tasks.result: Improved and validated swarm stats accuracy by adding live /health fallback when periodic mesh health log events are not yet present.

tasks.description: Create API contract tests for /api/swarm-status, /api/swarm-stats, /api/project-dashboard, /api/token-usage.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Contract tests verify status code and response schema guarantees.
tasks.result: Added automated tests for control access policy and swarm-stats fallback in src/__tests__/swarmDashboardRoutes.test.js.

tasks.description: Assess model-usage telemetry classification and token usage aggregation fidelity.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Token usage metrics remain stable under filter combinations.

tasks.description: Validate dashboard export endpoints for json/csv/pdf compatibility with PM task schema.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Exports include all required PM fields with correct type mapping.

tasks.description: Harden dashboard error-state propagation when mesh control calls return non-2xx upstream responses.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: UI receives actionable error payloads without uncaught failures.
tasks.result: Dashboard control endpoints now preserve structured upstream 401/403/502 error payloads so the UI can represent mesh failures without uncaught 5xx behavior.

tasks.description: Update dashboard operator guidance for filters, exports, and degraded-mode interpretation.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Guidance aligns with current API behavior and runtime modes.

tasks.description: Produce dashboard acceptance evidence pack linking API payloads to visible UI sections.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Evidence maps source fields to displayed metrics and task lists.

tasks.description: Review server-side dashboard data normalization for schema variants and missing fields.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Normalization handles array/object-map/canonical project schemas consistently.

tasks.description: Run exploratory UX pass on filter/sort combinations and identify confusing interactions.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Usability issues prioritized with clear reproduction steps.

tasks.description: Add dashboard telemetry events for filter usage, export actions, and control operations.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Telemetry captures operator actions without sensitive payload leakage.

tasks.description: Define dashboard backlog triage flow so PM tasks stay synchronized with discovered UI/API defects.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: New dashboard defects are automatically linked to milestones and owners.

history.result: Improved and validated swarm stats accuracy by adding live /health fallback when periodic mesh health log events are not yet present.
Added automated tests for control access policy and swarm-stats fallback in src/__tests__/swarmDashboardRoutes.test.js.
Dashboard control endpoints now preserve structured upstream 401/403/502 error payloads so the UI can represent mesh failures without uncaught 5xx behavior.

projects.name: Project D: PM Tool Enhancement for Dashboard Reporting
projects.description: Enhance project/task data model and sync flow so dashboard reporting fields are complete and reliable.

milestones.name: D1 Schema Coverage Expanded
milestones.successCriteria: Milestone, priority, owner, and KPI fields consistently populated

milestones.name: D2 Integration Contract Stable
milestones.successCriteria: Dashboard consumes PM data without compatibility gaps

milestones.name: D3 Data Integrity Restored
milestones.successCriteria: Legacy projects normalize to canonical schema

milestones.name: D4 Sync Automation Established
milestones.successCriteria: Sync and validation checks run automatically

tasks.description: Design migration plan from legacy object-map project schema to canonical {projects,metadata} format.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Migration plan preserves task history and status semantics.

tasks.description: Define required PM fields for dashboard parity (milestone, owner, priority, timestamps, KPIs).
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Field contract documented with required/optional flags.

tasks.description: Validate PM data accessibility from dashboard runtimePaths candidate resolution logic.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard always resolves freshest valid projects file.
tasks.result: Validated PM/dashboard path resolution and ensured planned projects/tasks are surfaced correctly by dashboard APIs.

tasks.description: Create PM task state transition guardrails and blocked/deferred semantics for dashboard display.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Status mapping prevents ambiguous state transitions.

tasks.description: Audit agent ownership registry to enforce valid agent assignment values in PM tasks.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Assignments reject unknown agent identifiers.

tasks.description: Prototype PM schema validation utility and sample invalid-record detection output.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Validator detects missing required fields and type mismatches.

tasks.description: Review milestone semantics for measurable outcomes and completion criteria quality.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Milestones have objective completion gates.

tasks.description: Create regression tests for PM read/write paths and dashboard summary derivation.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover canonical, array, and legacy PM schema formats.

tasks.description: Review PM storage for injection/path traversal risks when reading dynamic file candidates.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: File handling is constrained to intended paths and validated input.

tasks.description: Document PM schema reference and operator update procedure for manual edits.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Schema guide includes examples and safe-update workflow.

tasks.description: Produce audit trail template linking PM field changes to dashboard metric impacts.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Change log format enables traceability of metric shifts.

tasks.description: Define PM synchronization governance and cadence across orchestrator, supervisor, and dashboard.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Sync cadence and ownership are explicit and enforceable.

history.result: Validated PM/dashboard path resolution and ensured planned projects/tasks are surfaced correctly by dashboard APIs.

projects.name: Project E: Deep Audit & Improvement of Main Application Above deploy
projects.description: Perform full-spectrum audit of the application/repository above deploy and convert findings into prioritized fixes.

milestones.name: E1 Critical and High-Risk Audit Complete
milestones.successCriteria: Critical and high findings have owner, impact, and fix recommendation

milestones.name: E2 Broad Quality Audit Complete
milestones.outcome: Architecture, UX, DB, testing, docs reviewed
milestones.successCriteria: All 10 review categories covered with severity tagging

milestones.name: E3 Remediation Backlog Ready
milestones.successCriteria: Findings translated into granular fix tasks with priorities

milestones.name: E4 Residual Risk and Debt Registered
milestones.successCriteria: Blocked/deferred work includes rationale and follow-up owner

tasks.description: Run security-focused code sweep for authentication, session, CSRF, and sensitive-data exposure risks.
tasks.milestone: E1 Critical and High-Risk Audit Complete
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: All exploitable auth/session issues are severity-ranked and reproducible.
tasks.result: Reviewed and fixed auth/session/CSRF risks by hardening swarm control authorization, replacing the broken global csurf flow with same-origin mutation protection, and preserving a safe test-mode session-secret fallback.

tasks.description: Audit dependency versions for known vulnerabilities, unused packages, and license concerns.
tasks.milestone: E1 Critical and High-Risk Audit Complete
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Dependency risk list includes upgrade path and compatibility notes.
tasks.result: Removed the unused csurf dependency, upgraded multer to 2.1.1, and re-ran npm audit with zero remaining production vulnerabilities in deploy/reploy-stack/app.

tasks.description: Identify runtime crash paths, null/undefined hazards, and malformed-input handling gaps.
tasks.milestone: E1 Critical and High-Risk Audit Complete
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Critical runtime failures include exact file/line and deterministic trigger.
tasks.result: Eliminated runtime failures by adding a test-mode session-secret fallback, migrating confirmation_requests.token_hash with backfill-safe schema logic, and fixing duplicate response lookup behavior.

tasks.description: Review edge-case behavior for workflows spanning trial checks, auth bypasses, and static route guards.
tasks.milestone: E1 Critical and High-Risk Audit Complete
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Edge-case map includes regressions and expected behavior definition.

tasks.description: Analyze performance bottlenecks in API handlers, large payload paths, and expensive loops.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Performance findings quantify hotspots and suggest measurable optimizations.

tasks.description: Evaluate database schema usage, indexing opportunities, transaction safety, and query patterns.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: DB findings include index/query recommendations tied to workload impact.
tasks.result: Extended confirmation_requests with token_hash plus migration/index support so verification and response-tracking queries remain consistent on existing databases.

tasks.description: Perform UI/UX and accessibility review for dashboard/projects flows on desktop and mobile.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Accessibility findings include WCAG-oriented remediation guidance.
tasks.result: Fixed the support-center contact flow to submit against the shared form endpoint, added truthful error/success states plus honeypot protection, and clarified the contact-page fallback when no endpoint is configured.

tasks.description: Assess architecture scalability, coupling boundaries, and API surface design consistency.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Architecture findings include concrete decoupling or layering improvements.

tasks.description: Evaluate test coverage gaps and define required unit/integration/e2e additions.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Coverage plan maps missing tests to high-risk code paths.
tasks.result: Added regression coverage for swarm control access, live swarm-stats fallback, missing-credentials mesh startup, and stabilized full-suite execution with a realistic Jest timeout budget.

tasks.description: Review documentation freshness for setup, deployment, APIs, and operational runbooks.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Documentation gap list includes stale sections and update owners.
tasks.result: Updated deploy documentation and environment examples to describe swarm control security, runtime modes, and deploy expectations.

tasks.description: Produce consolidated findings matrix with severity, impact, and recommended fix details.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Matrix includes file path, line refs, severity, priority, and fix summary.

tasks.description: Audit CI/CD workflow robustness, secret handling, and deployment pipeline guardrails.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: CI/CD findings include failing-path diagnostics and hardening actions.
tasks.result: Audited and hardened the HostGator deploy workflow with static-site validation, serialized deploy concurrency, least-privilege permissions, and excludes that prevent publishing deploy/internal files.

tasks.description: Review logging/monitoring quality, missing alerts, and observability blind spots.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Observability report covers detection gaps and alert priority tiers.

tasks.description: Identify weak error-handling patterns and exception flows lacking user-safe fallbacks.
tasks.milestone: E1 Critical and High-Risk Audit Complete
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Error-handling findings include required guardrails and fallback behavior.

tasks.description: Review API contracts and integration points for validation, authz, and compatibility risks.
tasks.milestone: E1 Critical and High-Risk Audit Complete
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: API findings include contract violations and remediation priority.

tasks.description: Transform audited findings into prioritized fix-ready PM tasks with owner and milestone mapping.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Every accepted finding is represented as a granular, owner-assigned task.

tasks.description: Create residual risk register and classify deferred findings as blocked or long-term debt with owner assignment.
tasks.milestone: E4 Residual Risk and Debt Registered
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: All deferred findings include rationale, owner, and review date.

history.result: Reviewed and fixed auth/session/CSRF risks by hardening swarm control authorization, replacing the broken global csurf flow with same-origin mutation protection, and preserving a safe test-mode session-secret fallback.
Eliminated runtime failures by adding a test-mode session-secret fallback, migrating confirmation_requests.token_hash with backfill-safe schema logic, and fixing duplicate response lookup behavior.
Extended confirmation_requests with token_hash plus migration/index support so verification and response-tracking queries remain consistent on existing databases.
Added regression coverage for swarm control access, live swarm-stats fallback, missing-credentials mesh startup, and stabilized full-suite execution with a realistic Jest timeout budget.
Updated deploy documentation and environment examples to describe swarm control security, runtime modes, and deploy expectations.
Removed the unused csurf dependency, upgraded multer to 2.1.1, and re-ran npm audit with zero remaining production vulnerabilities in deploy/reploy-stack/app.

Fixed the support-center contact flow to submit against the shared form endpoint, added truthful error/success states plus honeypot protection, and clarified the contact-page fallback when no endpoint is configured.
Audited and hardened the HostGator deploy workflow with static-site validation, serialized deploy concurrency, least-privilege permissions, and excludes that prevent publishing deploy/internal files.

projects.name: Project F: DevOps, CI/CD, Observability & Ongoing Maintenance
projects.description: Improve operational reliability, release discipline, monitoring, and long-term maintenance workflows.

milestones.name: F1 CI/CD Hardening
milestones.successCriteria: Build/test/deploy pipeline blocks regressions reliably

milestones.name: F2 Runtime Observability
milestones.successCriteria: Core reliability signals observable with low noise

milestones.name: F3 Release and Packaging Reliability
milestones.successCriteria: Release process reproducible with rollback guidance

milestones.name: F4 Maintenance Cadence Active
milestones.successCriteria: Ongoing debt, dependency, and documentation cycles scheduled

tasks.description: Harden CI workflow with deterministic checks for integrity, bootstrap, smoke, and regression suites.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: CI gates prevent merges when critical checks fail.
tasks.result: Added a reusable static-site validation script, enforced it in GitHub Actions before deploy, serialized HostGator publishes, and limited deployment scope to production site assets only.

tasks.description: Validate packaging/deploy context consistency for Docker, Railway, and Reploy targets.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Deployment artifacts are reproducible across supported platforms.

tasks.description: Define release promotion and rollback checklist with explicit go/no-go criteria.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Release checklist ties validation evidence to deployment decisions.

tasks.description: Implement structured operational logging coverage map for startup, health, and control events.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Operational logs provide complete lifecycle visibility.

tasks.description: Establish reliability analytics baseline for uptime, task throughput, and error budget tracking.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Reliability dashboard metrics have defined sources and thresholds.

tasks.description: Review state persistence and migration safety for DB and swarm project/log directories.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Persistence plan protects state across restarts and redeploys.

tasks.description: Schedule dependency maintenance cadence with vulnerability SLA and upgrade windows.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Dependency policy defines cadence, ownership, and severity SLA.

tasks.description: Add bridge runtime maintenance checks to operational readiness and incident playbook.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Bridge health checks are part of standard maintenance routine.

tasks.description: Maintain authoritative agent registry snapshot and drift detection between code and runtime.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Agent roster drift is detected and surfaced to operators.

tasks.description: Coordinate ongoing orchestration backlog triage and cross-project dependency resolution.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Cross-project blockers are identified and re-prioritized promptly.

tasks.description: Create recurring health regression suite for bridge/swarm/dashboard/PM-tool critical paths.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Health regression suite executes on schedule and after major changes.
tasks.result: Validated deploy health regression paths with the README smoke checks and added src/__tests__/meshRuntime.test.js to cover missing-credentials swarm startup without agent crashes.

tasks.description: Update operations handbook with maintenance cadence, incident response, and ownership model.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Handbook reflects current operating model and escalation path.

history.result: Validated deploy health regression paths with the README smoke checks and added src/__tests__/meshRuntime.test.js to cover missing-credentials swarm startup without agent crashes.
Added a reusable static-site validation script, enforced it in GitHub Actions before deploy, serialized HostGator publishes, and limited deployment scope to production site assets only.
